summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Cooe Game platform - all major features working correctly. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend UI/UX excellent with all 5 games operational.
passed_tests: Backend: User registration and login flow
Backend: All 5 games API endpoints (Win Go, Aviator, AB Fun, Lucky Hit, Soccer Go)
Backend: Wallet balance, transactions, withdraw requests
Backend: Stripe payment packages and checkout creation
Backend: Admin dashboard, users, transactions, game stats
Frontend: Lobby with all 5 game cards displayed
Frontend: Win Go page with timer, betting options (Red/Green/Violet, Numbers 0-9)
Frontend: Aviator page with multiplier display and game phases
Frontend: AB Fun page with Andar/Bahar/Tie betting
Frontend: Lucky Hit page with Side A/B/Tie options
Frontend: Soccer Go page with Team A/B/Draw betting
Frontend: Wallet page with deposit packages and withdraw form
Frontend: Admin dashboard with stats, user management, transactions
